disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive vaginal dryness and rawness over about two years since periods stopped
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The dryness has been creeping up for about two years, ever since my periods stopped, but tonight it got really raw and bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A small amount of bleeding on contact after being intimate tonight
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: After being intimate tonight there was a small amount of blood, just on the tissue when I wiped — not a heavy flow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning pain on passing urine and passing urine more often
trigger_question_examples: Any burning or needing to go more often?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Weeing is agony — it stings terribly and I am going a lot more often, just like when I get a water infection.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of several culture-confirmed urinary tract infections in the past year
trigger_question_examples: Have you had water infections before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I have had several bladder infections this past year and they were confirmed on the urine tests each time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated use of over-the-counter thrush creams with no improvement
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have used thrush creams from the chemist over and over but they have not helped at all — if anything it feels worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or chills; urine reported as clear and not cloudy or foul-smelling
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, chills or feeling generally unwell?
Is your urine cloudy or smelly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shivers, I don't feel unwell in myself, and my urine looks clear and normal, not cloudy or smelly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Postmenopausal (about two years) and not taking any hormone therapy
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any hormone treatment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I went through the change about two years ago and I am not on any hormone treatment.
